ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "dpco" INTEGER /* DPCO (Drugs Price Control Order) year */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "company_established_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was established */,
  "company_status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., active, suspended, dissolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formulations" (
  "formulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formulation */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that owns the formulation */,
  "formulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the formulation */,
  "formulation_type" TEXT /* Type of formulation (e.g., capsule, tablet) */,
  "formulation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the formulation */,
  "formulation_active_ingredients" TEXT /* Active ingredients in the formulation */,
  "formulation_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the formulation */,
  "formulation_pack_size" TEXT /* Pack size of the formulation */,
  "formulation_approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval by regulatory bodies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formulations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company on which the penalty is imposed */,
  "period_of_demand" TEXT /* Period for which the penalty is imposed */,
  "principal_overcharged" REAL /* Principal amount overcharged by the company */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Penalty amount imposed on the company */,
  "interest_calculated" REAL /* Interest calculated on the penalty */,
  "interest_date" TEXT /* Date on which the interest is calculated */,
  "penalty_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty */,
  "penalty_imposed_date" TEXT /* Date when the penalty was imposed */,
  "penalty_due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the penalty should be paid */,
  "penalty_status" TEXT /* Status of the penalty (e.g., pending, paid, disputed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recoveries" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the penalty from which the recovery is made */,
  "recovered_amount" REAL /* Amount recovered from the company */,
  "outstanding_amount" REAL /* Outstanding amount after recovery */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the recovery was made */,
  "recovery_method" TEXT /* Method of recovery (e.g., direct payment, installment) */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Status of the recovery (e.g., partial, full, none) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recoveries_penalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("penalty_id") REFERENCES penalties ("penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulatory official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "formulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formulation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_formulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formulation_id") REFERENCES formulations ("formulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods_of_demand" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the penalty for which the period is defined */,
  "period_of_demand" TEXT /* Period for which the penalty is imposed */,
  "period_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_periods_of_demand_penalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("penalty_id") REFERENCES penalties ("penalty_id")
)
